name: Main Street Capital CORP
summary: PART I ORGANIZATION Main Street Capital Corporation (MSCC or, together with its consolidated subsidiaries, Main Street or the Company) is a principal investment firm primarily focused on providing customized long-term debt and equity capital solutions to lower middle market (LMM) companies (its LMM investment strategy) and debt capital to private (Private Loan) companies owned by or in the process of being acquired by a private equity fund (its Private Loan investment strategy).
